# Network allowlist for Tournamental.
#
# Hosts referenced in source code (fetch / axios / got / new URL / https.request)
# must be on this list. Any new host triggers a CI flag and a human review
# step. To add a host, open a PR adding a line + a one-line justification
# in the commit message, and ensure your PR also explains the new
# integration in the relevant doc under docs/security/03-third-party-dependency-policy.md.
#
# Lines starting with `#` are comments. A leading `.` denotes "this domain
# and any subdomain" (e.g. `.example.com` allows `api.example.com`).

# --- our own surfaces ---
.tournamental.com
# aiva.nz is on this list because Tournamental's default SMS gateway integration
# (packages/aiva-client) targets the Aiva SMS service at sms.aiva.nz. Override
# via AIVA_SMS_API_URL to point at any compatible gateway.
.aiva.nz

# --- developer + community ---
github.com
api.github.com
raw.githubusercontent.com
objects.githubusercontent.com
pkg-files.githubusercontent.com
nodejs.org
registry.npmjs.org
pypi.org
pypi.python.org
files.pythonhosted.org
crates.io
deno.land

# --- fonts and CDNs (used in marketing/web; review before adding) ---
fonts.googleapis.com
fonts.gstatic.com

# --- payments / odds / data sources approved per docs/30 + docs/12 ---
api.the-odds-api.com
gamma-api.polymarket.com
strapi-prod.up.railway.app

# --- partner OAuth + DM-OTP providers (docs/20, docs/32) ---
.googleapis.com
api.telegram.org
graph.facebook.com
api.twitter.com
api.x.com
www.reddit.com
oauth.reddit.com
discord.com
api.linkedin.com

# --- StatsBomb data (docs/11) ---
raw.githubusercontent.com
statsbomb.com

# --- OpenAI / Anthropic (only used by reviewer-agent, gated by env) ---
api.openai.com
api.anthropic.com
